features.name: this as standalone expression passed to $sformatf in class method
features.description: Code should include a class method where the bare 'this' keyword is passed as an argument to $sformatf, e.g., return $sformatf("%p", this); to format the entire current object instance.
features.snippet: class C; function string get_s; return $sformatf("%p", this); endfunction endclass

features.name: this as standalone expression in class method return
features.description: Code should include a class method that returns or uses the bare 'this' keyword as a standalone expression, not as a member accessor (this.member).
features.snippet: class C; function C get_obj; return this; endfunction endclass
